{{Infobox character
| name = The Killer
| aliases = Killer
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Guild Head
| affiliations = Consultants
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]], also known as the Killer, is a figure of prophecy identified by the [[Sleepless]]. Described as one of the [[Am’haranai]], she was expected to live and die in obscurity five years prior to current events. However, her continued existence acts as a deviation from the plans of [[Kelarac]], who intended for [[Calder Marten]] to rule. Prophecies suggest she will be responsible for spilling the blood of a Rebel, and that a [[King]] will emerge from her actions. She is characterized as having no heart, which enables her to strike down [[the Emperor]]. Her history includes killing an [[Emperor]] by plunging a knife into his heart and being involved in the death of [[Maxwell]]. She is also noted for her ability to move with spider-like grace and has been driven by dreams from the [[Great Ones]] to act against her destiny.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Killer]] is [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Killer]] is a role played by [[Shera]] five years ago.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Killer]] is an entity that must not meet the [[King]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Killer]] is prophesied to spill the blood of the Rebel.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] call [[Shera]] the Killer.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Killer]] is the [[Guild Head]] of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Killer]] is made to slay those like him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“The Killer. Your husband said her name: Shera.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“The Killer had one part to play, and she played it. Five years ago.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
